title: scope.list request

kind.description: Action-specific kind input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

max_depth.description: Action-specific max_depth input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name_pattern.description: Action-specific name_pattern input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

path.description: Scope path to list. Empty string or '.' returns top-level scopes.

recursive.description: Action-specific recursive input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

x-purpose: 列出 FSDB scope 或信号。
x-how_it_works: 从 waveform 数据库遍历 scope，按 path/recursive/max_depth 遍历或截断；无 scope 时列根层级。
x-when_to_use: 帮助定位真实层次和信号路径。
x-description-zh: 列出 FSDB scope 或信号。

use_when: 列出 FSDB scope 或信号。
do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 scope.roots 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。
